text.title: Prompt Version Pinning Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the lock file, gateway events, and rollback receipts.

field.name: gateway_policy.allowed_versions
field.notes: prompt_id -> list of acceptable versions for the env

forbidden.pattern: lockfile.entries[].active_version uses a mutable tag like latest or v_current
lockfile.entries[].rollout_strategy = full AND no canary entry in history within the past 30 days for this prompt
history entry has retired_at without retire_reason
A/B comparison entry with rollout_percent split open for more than 4 weeks without a close decision

allowed-transformations.transformation: Promote a version from shadow to canary to full without a new prompt-hash change (rollout-percent change only); the lockfile records each transition.
Pin a version per-tenant via guarded_flag; the lockfile records the flag id and the segment.
Use a higher canary percentage (e.g. 10%) when traffic to that prompt is low, to reach statistical closure within the planned window.

list.item: All active_version values are immutable IDs
Gateway rejects unpinned calls in prod
Every active version has a documented rollout_strategy
Rollback receipt template present and the CLI produces it on every rollback
At least one A/B comparison active at any time
